```{r Volume Past and Future All, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
  # RowStyle = function(index) {
  #           if (index %in% c(nrow(referral_vol_site_data_mshs))) {
  #             list(`border-top` = "2px solid rgb(184,184,184)",
  #                  fontWeight = "Bold")
  #           }
  #         },
    highlight = TRUE,
    # filterable = TRUE,
    pagination = FALSE,
    # height = 800,
    wrap = TRUE,
  searchable = TRUE,

  groupBy = c("MSHS", "SITE", "DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME"),

  columnGroups = list(
    colGroup(name = "", columns = c("MSHS", "SITE", "DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME", "DEPARTMENT_NAME", "DEPARTMENT_ID"),
             headerStyle = list(color = "black", fontSize = "15px"),
             sticky = "left"),
    colGroup(name = paste0("2026 Completed Visits (", format(as.Date("2026-01-01"), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_past", "Anthem_past", "Medicare_Advantage_past", "Individual_Marketplace_past", "Other_Payor_past",
                         "Total_past_perc", "Anthem_past_perc", "Medicare_Advantage_past_perc", "Individual_Marketplace_past_perc", "Other_Payor_past_perc"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("2026 Scheduled Visits Next 14 Days (", format(as.Date(report_run_date), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_next_14days), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_future", "Anthem_future", "Medicare_Advantage_future", "Individual_Marketplace_future", "Other_Payor_future",
                         "Total_future_perc", "Anthem_future_perc", "Medicare_Advantage_future_perc", "Individual_Marketplace_future_perc", "Other_Payor_future_perc"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    # colGroup(name = paste0("Volume Variance"),
    #          columns = c("Total_Var", "CoC_Var", "Non_CoC_Var", "MSS_Attributed_Var", "Other_Payor_Var"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    # colGroup(name = paste0("Volume Variance %"),
    #          columns = c("Total_Var_Perc", "CoC_Var_Perc", "Non_CoC_Var_Perc", "MSS_Attributed_Var_Perc", "Other_Payor_Var_Perc"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    # colGroup(name = paste0("New Patient Capture*"),
    #          columns = c("NEW_LOS", "NEW_LOS_baseline", "new_pt_var_baseline",
    #                      "perc_new_los", "perc_new_los_baseline", "perc_new_los_var_baseline",
    #                      "perc_new_pt_target", "perc_new_los_var_target"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#a5a7a5", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    ),

  columns = list(

     MSHS = colDef(
      name = "MSHS",
      maxWidth = 100),

     SITE = colDef(
      name = "Site",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Specialty",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPARTMENT_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Department",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPARTMENT_ID = colDef(
      name = "Department ID",
      minWidth = 120),

     Total_past = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Anthem_past = colDef(
      name = "Anthem",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Medicare_Advantage_past = colDef(
      name = "Medicare Advantage",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Individual_Marketplace_past = colDef(
      name = "Individual Marketplace",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Other_Payor_past = colDef(
      name = "Other Payor",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Total_past_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_past = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_past += row['Total_past']
        })
        return (totalTotal_past / totalTotal_past) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Anthem_past_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Anthem",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_past = 0
        let totalAnthem_past = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_past += row['Total_past']
          totalAnthem_past += row['Anthem_past']
        })
        return (totalAnthem_past / totalTotal_past) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Medicare_Advantage_past_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Medicare Advantage",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_past = 0
        let totalMedicare_Advantage_past = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_past += row['Total_past']
          totalMedicare_Advantage_past += row['Medicare_Advantage_past']
        })
        return (totalMedicare_Advantage_past / totalTotal_past) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Individual_Marketplace_past_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Individual Marketplace",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_past = 0
        let totalIndividual_Marketplace_past = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_past += row['Total_past']
          totalIndividual_Marketplace_past += row['Individual_Marketplace_past']
        })
        return (totalIndividual_Marketplace_past / totalTotal_past) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Other_Payor_past_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Other Payor",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_past = 0
        let totalOther_Payor_past = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_past += row['Total_past']
          totalOther_Payor_past += row['Other_Payor_past']
        })
        return (totalOther_Payor_past / totalTotal_past) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Total_future = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Anthem_future = colDef(
      name = "Anthem",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Medicare_Advantage_future = colDef(
      name = "Medicare Advantage",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Individual_Marketplace_future = colDef(
      name = "Individual Marketplace",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Other_Payor_future = colDef(
      name = "Other Payor",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),


     Total_future_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_future = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_future += row['Total_future']
        })
        return (totalTotal_future / totalTotal_future) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Anthem_future_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Anthem",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_future = 0
        let totalAnthem_future = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_future += row['Total_future']
          totalAnthem_future += row['Anthem_future']
        })
        return (totalAnthem_future / totalTotal_future) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Medicare_Advantage_future_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Medicare Advantage",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_future = 0
        let totalMedicare_Advantage_future = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_future += row['Total_future']
          totalMedicare_Advantage_future += row['Medicare_Advantage_future']
        })
        return (totalMedicare_Advantage_future / totalTotal_future) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Individual_Marketplace_future_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Individual Marketplace",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_future = 0
        let totalIndividual_Marketplace_future = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_future += row['Total_future']
          totalIndividual_Marketplace_future += row['Individual_Marketplace_future']
        })
        return (totalIndividual_Marketplace_future / totalTotal_future) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),

     Other_Payor_future_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Other Payor",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_future = 0
        let totalOther_Payor_future = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_future += row['Total_future']
          totalOther_Payor_future += row['Other_Payor_future']
        })
        return (totalOther_Payor_future / totalTotal_future) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1))

     

  ) # Close Columns

  ) # Close Reactable
) # Close Taglist
) # Close htmltools

```


## Digital Bookings (Last 7 Days)
```{r Digital Bookings, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}


htmltools::browsable(
  tagList(
    tags$button(
      tagList(fontawesome::fa("download"), "Download Table"),
      onclick = "Reactable.downloadDataCSV('appts-scheduled-digital', 'Appts Scheduled')"
    ),

# htmltools::browsable(
#   tagList(
#     div(tags$label("Summary by", `for` = "access-roi")),
#     tags$select(
#       id = "access-roi",
#       onchange = "Reactable.setGroupBy('access-metrics', this.value ? [this.value] : [])",
#       tags$option("None", value = ""),
#       lapply(c("Year", "Month"), tags$option)
#     ),
#
#     tags$hr("aria-hidden" = "true"),

reactable(
  last_7day_bookings %>%
    filter(SITE %in% c("MSB", "MSBI", "MSDMG", "MSH- AMBULATORY CARE", "MSH-MSDFP", "MSM", "MSQ",
                       "MSUS", "MSW", "NETWORK", "NYEE", "MSB", "MSSN")),
  elementId = "appts-scheduled-digital",
  # elementId = "referral-vol-download-table",
  style = list(fontFamily = 'Calibri',
                 fontSize = '14px'),
    defaultColDef = colDef(align = "left",
                           headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
                           headerClass = "bar-sort-header"),
  # RowStyle = function(index) {
  #           if (index %in% c(nrow(referral_vol_site_data_mshs))) {
  #             list(`border-top` = "2px solid rgb(184,184,184)",
  #                  fontWeight = "Bold")
  #           }
  #         },
    highlight = TRUE,
    # filterable = TRUE,
    pagination = FALSE,
    # height = 800,
    wrap = TRUE,
  searchable = TRUE,

  groupBy = c("MSHS", "SITE", "DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME"),

  columnGroups = list(
    colGroup(name = "", columns = c("MSHS", "SITE", "DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME", "DEPARTMENT_NAME", "DEPARTMENT_ID"),
             headerStyle = list(color = "black", fontSize = "15px"),
             sticky = "left"),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Anthem Bookings (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Anthem", "Anthem_Y", "Anthem_N", "Anthem_digital"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Anthem Medicare Advantage Bookings (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Medicare_Advantage", "Medicare_Advantage_Y", "Medicare_Advantage_N", "Medicare_Advantage_digital"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Anthem Individual Marketplace (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Individual_Marketplace", "Individual_Marketplace_Y", "Individual_Marketplace_N", "Individual_Marketplace_digital"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Other Payor Bookings (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Other_Payor", "Other_Payor_Y", "Other_Payor_N", "Other_Payor_digital"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    # colGroup(name = paste0("Volume Variance"),
    #          columns = c("Total_Var", "CoC_Var", "Non_CoC_Var", "MSS_Attributed_Var", "Other_Payor_Var"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    # colGroup(name = paste0("Volume Variance %"),
    #          columns = c("Total_Var_Perc", "CoC_Var_Perc", "Non_CoC_Var_Perc", "MSS_Attributed_Var_Perc", "Other_Payor_Var_Perc"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    # colGroup(name = paste0("New Patient Capture*"),
    #          columns = c("NEW_LOS", "NEW_LOS_baseline", "new_pt_var_baseline",
    #                      "perc_new_los", "perc_new_los_baseline", "perc_new_los_var_baseline",
    #                      "perc_new_pt_target", "perc_new_los_var_target"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#a5a7a5", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    ),

  columns = list(

     MSHS = colDef(
      name = "MSHS",
      maxWidth = 100),

     SITE = colDef(
      name = "Site",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Specialty",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPARTMENT_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Department",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPARTMENT_ID = colDef(
      name = "Department ID",
      minWidth = 120),

     Total_Anthem = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Anthem_Y = colDef(
      name = "Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Anthem_N = colDef(
      name = "Scheduler Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Anthem_digital = colDef(
      name = "% Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Anthem = 0
        let totalAnthem_Y = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Anthem += row['Total_Anthem']
          totalAnthem_Y += row['Anthem_Y']
        })
        return (totalAnthem_Y / totalTotal_Anthem) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     Total_Medicare_Advantage = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Medicare_Advantage_Y = colDef(
      name = "Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Medicare_Advantage_N = colDef(
      name = "Scheduler Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Medicare_Advantage_digital = colDef(
      name = "% Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Medicare_Advantage = 0
        let totalMedicare_Advantage_Y = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Medicare_Advantage += row['Total_Medicare_Advantage']
          totalMedicare_Advantage_Y += row['Medicare_Advantage_Y']
        })
        return (totalMedicare_Advantage_Y / totalTotal_Medicare_Advantage) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     Total_Individual_Marketplace = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Individual_Marketplace_Y = colDef(
      name = "Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Individual_Marketplace_N = colDef(
      name = "Scheduler Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Individual_Marketplace_digital = colDef(
      name = "% Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Individual_Marketplace = 0
        let totalIndividual_Marketplace_Y = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Individual_Marketplace += row['Total_Individual_Marketplace']
          totalIndividual_Marketplace_Y += row['Individual_Marketplace_Y']
        })
        return (totalIndividual_Marketplace_Y / totalTotal_Individual_Marketplace) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     Total_Other_Payor = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Other_Payor_Y = colDef(
      name = "Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Other_Payor_N = colDef(
      name = "Scheduler Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Other_Payor_digital = colDef(
      name = "% Online Booking",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Other_Payor = 0
        let totalOther_Payor_Y = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Other_Payor += row['Total_Other_Payor']
          totalOther_Payor_Y += row['Other_Payor_Y']
        })
        return (totalOther_Payor_Y / totalTotal_Other_Payor) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1))
     

  ) # Close Columns

  ) # Close Reactable
) # Close Taglist
) # Close htmltools

```


## Time to Appt (Last 7 Days)
```{r Time to Appointment, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}


htmltools::browsable(
  tagList(
    tags$button(
      tagList(fontawesome::fa("download"), "Download Table"),
      onclick = "Reactable.downloadDataCSV('appts-scheduled-ttapt', 'Appts Scheduled')"
    ),

# htmltools::browsable(
#   tagList(
#     div(tags$label("Summary by", `for` = "access-roi")),
#     tags$select(
#       id = "access-roi",
#       onchange = "Reactable.setGroupBy('access-metrics', this.value ? [this.value] : [])",
#       tags$option("None", value = ""),
#       lapply(c("Year", "Month"), tags$option)
#     ),
#
#     tags$hr("aria-hidden" = "true"),

reactable(
  last_7day_bookings_leadDays %>%
    filter(SITE %in% c("MSB", "MSBI", "MSDMG", "MSH- AMBULATORY CARE", "MSH-MSDFP", "MSM", "MSQ",
                       "MSUS", "MSW", "NETWORK", "NYEE", "MSB", "MSSN")),
  elementId = "appts-scheduled-ttapt",
  # elementId = "referral-vol-download-table",
  style = list(fontFamily = 'Calibri',
                 fontSize = '14px'),
    defaultColDef = colDef(align = "left",
                           headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
                           headerClass = "bar-sort-header"),
  # RowStyle = function(index) {
  #           if (index %in% c(nrow(referral_vol_site_data_mshs))) {
  #             list(`border-top` = "2px solid rgb(184,184,184)",
  #                  fontWeight = "Bold")
  #           }
  #         },
    highlight = TRUE,
    # filterable = TRUE,
    pagination = FALSE,
    # height = 800,
    wrap = TRUE,
  searchable = TRUE,

  groupBy = c("MSHS", "SITE", "DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME"),

  columnGroups = list(
    colGroup(name = "", columns = c("MSHS", "SITE", "DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME", "DEPARTMENT_NAME", "DEPARTMENT_ID"),
             headerStyle = list(color = "black", fontSize = "15px"),
             sticky = "left"),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Anthem Bookings (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Anthem", "Anthem_lead_14days", "Anthem_lead_14days_more", "Anthem_14days_perc"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Anthem Medicare Advantage Bookings (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Medicare_Advantage", "Medicare_Advantage_lead_14days", "Medicare_Advantage_lead_14days_more", "Medicare_Advantage_14days_perc"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Anthem Individual Marketplace (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Individual_Marketplace", "Individual_Marketplace_lead_14days", "Individual_Marketplace_lead_14days_more", "Individual_Marketplace_14days_perc"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    colGroup(name = paste0("Other Payor Bookings (", format(as.Date(date_last_7days), "%m/%d"),"-",format(as.Date(date_end_2026), "%m/%d"),")"),
             columns = c("Total_Other_Payor", "Other_Payor_lead_14days", "Other_Payor_lead_14days_more", "Other_Payor_14days_perc"),
             headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    # colGroup(name = paste0("Volume Variance"),
    #          columns = c("Total_Var", "CoC_Var", "Non_CoC_Var", "MSS_Attributed_Var", "Other_Payor_Var"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#d80b8c", color = "white", fontSize = "15px")),
    # colGroup(name = paste0("Volume Variance %"),
    #          columns = c("Total_Var_Perc", "CoC_Var_Perc", "Non_CoC_Var_Perc", "MSS_Attributed_Var_Perc", "Other_Payor_Var_Perc"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#00aeef", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    # colGroup(name = paste0("New Patient Capture*"),
    #          columns = c("NEW_LOS", "NEW_LOS_baseline", "new_pt_var_baseline",
    #                      "perc_new_los", "perc_new_los_baseline", "perc_new_los_var_baseline",
    #                      "perc_new_pt_target", "perc_new_los_var_target"),
    #          headerStyle = list(background = "#a5a7a5", color = "white", fontSize = "15px"))
    ),

  columns = list(

     MSHS = colDef(
      name = "MSHS",
      maxWidth = 100),

     SITE = colDef(
      name = "Site",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPT_SPECIALTY_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Specialty",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPARTMENT_NAME = colDef(
      name = "Department",
      minWidth = 200),

     DEPARTMENT_ID = colDef(
      name = "Department ID",
      minWidth = 120),

     Total_Anthem = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Anthem_lead_14days = colDef(
      name = "<=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Anthem_lead_14days_more = colDef(
      name = ">14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Anthem_14days_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Scheduled <=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Anthem = 0
        let totalAnthem_lead_14days = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Anthem += row['Total_Anthem']
          totalAnthem_lead_14days += row['Anthem_lead_14days']
        })
        return (totalAnthem_lead_14days / totalTotal_Anthem) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     Total_Medicare_Advantage = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Medicare_Advantage_lead_14days = colDef(
      name = "<=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Medicare_Advantage_lead_14days_more = colDef(
      name = ">14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Medicare_Advantage_14days_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Scheduled <=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Medicare_Advantage = 0
        let totalMedicare_Advantage_lead_14days = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Medicare_Advantage += row['Total_Medicare_Advantage']
          totalMedicare_Advantage_lead_14days += row['Medicare_Advantage_lead_14days']
        })
        return (totalMedicare_Advantage_lead_14days / totalTotal_Medicare_Advantage) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     Total_Individual_Marketplace = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Individual_Marketplace_lead_14days = colDef(
      name = "<=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Individual_Marketplace_lead_14days_more = colDef(
      name = ">14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#7f7f7f", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Individual_Marketplace_14days_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Scheduled <=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#A3A3A3", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Individual_Marketplace = 0
        let totalIndividual_Marketplace_lead_14days = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Individual_Marketplace += row['Total_Individual_Marketplace']
          totalIndividual_Marketplace_lead_14days += row['Individual_Marketplace_lead_14days']
        })
        return (totalIndividual_Marketplace_lead_14days / totalTotal_Individual_Marketplace) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1)),
     
     Total_Other_Payor = colDef(
      name = "Total",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),

     Other_Payor_lead_14days = colDef(
      name = "<=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Other_Payor_lead_14days_more = colDef(
      name = ">14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#212070", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = 'sum',
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)),
     
     Other_Payor_14days_perc = colDef(
      name = "% Scheduled <=14 Days",
      maxWidth = 80,
      headerStyle = list(background = "#5552CE", color = "white", fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
      aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) {
        let totalTotal_Other_Payor = 0
        let totalOther_Payor_lead_14days = 0
        rows.forEach(function(row) {
          totalTotal_Other_Payor += row['Total_Other_Payor']
          totalOther_Payor_lead_14days += row['Other_Payor_lead_14days']
        })
        return (totalOther_Payor_lead_14days/ totalTotal_Other_Payor) || '-'
      }"),
      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, digits = 1))
     

  ) # Close Columns

  ) # Close Reactable
) # Close Taglist
) # Close htmltools

```


## Time to Appt (Last 7 Days): Export
```{r Time to Appointment Export, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

htmltools::browsable(
  tagList(
    tags$button(
      tagList(fontawesome::fa("download"), "Download Table"),
      onclick = "Reactable.downloadDataCSV('appts-scheduled-14days', 'Anthem Appt Scheduled >14 Days')"
    ),
    reactable(last_7day_bookings_leadDays_export,
              elementId = "appts-scheduled-14days",
              style = list(fontFamily = 'Calibri',
                 fontSize = '14px'),
    defaultColDef = colDef(align = "left",
                           headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "Bold", fontSize = "14px"),
                           headerClass = "bar-sort-header"))
  ))

```
